about.bio: A passionate Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in C#, SQL Server, Next.js, and IoT systems. I enjoy building tools that bridge the physical and digital world — from factory MES dashboards to smart farm sensors.
softSkills: Fast Learner with a strong attention to detail
Adaptable and open to new challenges

experience.title: Bachelor of Engineering
experience.description: Major in Computer Engineering and Informatics. Focused on embedded systems and software development.

projects.title: Smart Farm IoT
projects.description: Real-time soil moisture and climate monitoring system using ESP32 sensors with Firebase as the backend and a live dashboard.

projects.title: MES Real-time Dashboard
